name: C-17 compliance-remove refuses to remove a default bundled entry without --force
command: printf -- '- id: soc2-tsc\n' > cat.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" soc2-tsc --catalog cat.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'force' err.txt && echo refused 1>&2
